Title: VCST-4960 STR Run 1 — changeCartConfiguredItem rejects fabricated sectionId
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. STR run 1/3 — Add Configurable Hat with valid sectionId then attempt changeCartConfiguredItem with fabricated sectionId 00000000-…; expects validationErrors non-empty AND cart state preserved (configItem id unchanged).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems >= 1
[ERRORS label=change_bad] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=change_bad] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.validationErrors >= 1
[DATA label=change_bad] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.validationErrors.0.errorCode is non-null
[DATA label=change_bad] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.validationErrors.0.errorMessage is non-null
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems.0.id = {{ORIG_CONFIG_ITEM_ID}}
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems.0.productId = {{ORIG_CONFIG_PRODUCT_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Item-4960-STR-1: HTTP 200 (validation is data-level); cart configItem.id preserved post-rejection
Failure_Signals: validationErrors empty (regression of fix); HTTP 4xx/5xx; configItem.id changes after rejection

Title: VCST-4960 Items 5+6 — changeCartConfiguredItem with VALID sectionId succeeds (no false positive)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. Verifies that fix does NOT break the happy path — addItem then changeCartConfiguredItem with VALID sectionId successfully updates the option, validationErrors stays empty, configItem.productId reflects new selection.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_valid] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=change_valid] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.validationErrors = 0
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{VALID_SECTION_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_ALT_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Items 5+6: valid path still succeeds, no false positive; configItem.productId mutated to alt option
Failure_Signals: validationErrors non-empty on valid update; productId unchanged; HTTP 500
